# Outputs

This directory holds generated output files from the pipeline.

## Generated Files (after running the pipeline)

| File | Generated By | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `summary_report.json` | `python/generate_summary.py` | JSON summary of all KPIs and distributions |

## Sample Output Structure (`summary_report.json`)

```json
{
  "generated_at": "2024-01-01",
  "customers": {
    "total_customers": 2000,
    "segment_distribution": {
      "Consumer": 1040,
      "Corporate": 640,
      "Home Office": 320
    },
    "region_distribution": {
      "Northeast": 412,
      "West": 398,
      "Midwest": 397,
      "Southeast": 396,
      "Southwest": 397
    },
    "signup_date_min": "2019-01-01",
    "signup_date_max": "2023-12-31"
  },
  "products": {
    "total_products": 200,
    "category_counts": {
      "Office Supplies": 60,
      "Technology": 50,
      "Furniture": 40,
      "Clothing": 30,
      "Sports & Outdoors": 20
    }
  },
  "transactions": {
    "total_transactions": 50000,
    "total_revenue": 4821543.21,
    "gross_margin_pct": 28.4,
    "avg_order_value": 96.43
  }
}
```

> **Note:** The `outputs/` directory is excluded from git (see `.gitignore`).
> Run `python python/generate_summary.py` to regenerate this file locally.
